---
title: "Anurag builds things"
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>#title-block-header { display: none; }</style>
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  # TODO: re-enable categories once there are more posts. Consider moving to navbar or horizontal bar above listing.
  categories: false
  feed: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

## Projects, experiments, and systems built in public.
